brief_text:
**SECURITY BRIEF — Week of Dec 21–Dec 27**
*(Data updated Jan 20 — typical 21-day reporting delay)*

**Status:** NORMAL — Activity 35% below average
24 property incidents in Hollywood Division this week.

**Incident Breakdown:**
• Residential Security: 4 incidents (16%)
• Other Property: 20 incidents (83%)

Tracking 75% below same week last year (24 vs 96).
Patterns detected: Other Property (17 in 72h); Residential Security (4 in 72h).
